form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (24.28) in a Special conditions race, finishing a 6 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from nine starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (24.28) in a Special conditions race, finishing a 6 length seventh. Goes very well from the draw boasting three victories and three places from nine starts. Looks well placed and should feature.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running last time with a fast early split and tried to lead throughout but run over late when fourth (22.45) at Shepparton over 390m. More than capable and well placed to find her best form.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 450m at Ballarat beaten 4.5 lengths (25.84) behind Lektra Skip in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 11. Racing well and has to be included.

form.formComment: Last start finished sixth in a Grade 5 on April 10 over 450m at Shepparton behind Paw Harry, beaten 9 lengths (26.40). Others better.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at this track. Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Form has been good with a placing two starts ago and a win three runs back. Last time out finished 2nd in a Special conditions Veteran race on April 13 over 390m at Shepparton behind Broadway Icon beaten 2.25 lengths (22.73). Around the mark recently. Among the leading chances.

Among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at Sandown to win by 2.25 lengths in 29.91, beating Amron Tommy. Last start finished 5th on March 3 over 485m at Horsham behind Neo Devere beaten 10 lengths (27.75) in a Grade 5 H. Others preferred.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 500m at this track beaten 11 lengths (28.62) behind Aston Summit in a Grade 5 H on March 20. Comes through a solid form race. Expected to feature.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage eighth but before that won by 2.25 lengths at Geelong (22.67) beating Paw Xanthie in a Grade 5 on April 3. Mixing his form but shapes as a genuine contender under these conditions.

form.formComment: Facing tougher opposition than she has faced recent starts and current form just not to what is required to figure. Not going well enough to figure in this.
